events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the required assessment JSON to `/app/answer.json` with the skipped insulation-resistance test treated as a high-risk failed closeout condition.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "if [ -f /app/answer.json ]; then sed -n '1,200p' /app/answer.json; else printf 'NO_FILE\\n'; fi"
→ NO_FILE
